name: Skywork-MoE-Base
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, 16 experts, 22B active (upcycled from Skywork-13B dense checkpoints)
note: 146B/22B-active MoE upcycled from Skywork-13B; first big open MoE runnable on a single 8x4090 server via FP8
tpsNote: Official FP8 checkpoint reaches ~2,200 tok/s aggregate across an 8x RTX4090 cluster via non-uniform tensor parallelism -- not a single-GPU llama.cpp Q4 measurement
